summary: Electrifying show with a memorable Help on the Way opener; recording source unknown but listeners report an enjoyable listening experience.
review: All three reviewers who attended the concert describe it as one of the best shows they’ve ever seen, highlighting the opening "Help on the Way" and the band’s ability to turn a chaotic start into a balanced, high‑energy performance. No specific audio‑quality comments are given, so the recording is assumed listenable but its source type remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high star ratings (5, 4, 5) and enthusiastic language indicate an outstanding performance; lack of technical criticism suggests the recording is at least adequate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not mention soundboard or audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues; listeners focus on concert atmosphere rather than technical fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Crowd‑charged opening with "Help on the Way" set a positive tone; despite a chaotic entrance, the band delivered a balanced, high‑energy set that left attendees thrilled.
